# Reproducer derived from https://github.com/home-assistant/core/issues/130245
# repo: home-assistant/core
# title: Pi_hole integration doesn't work on pi_hole V6

# Last frames in traceback:
#   /usr/src/homeassistant/homeassistant/helpers/entity.py line 1007 in async_write_ha_state
#   /usr/src/homeassistant/homeassistant/helpers/entity.py line 1132 in _async_write_ha_state
#   /usr/src/homeassistant/homeassistant/helpers/entity.py line 1069 in __async_calculate_state
#   /usr/src/homeassistant/homeassistant/helpers/entity.py line 1013 in _stringify_state
#   /usr/src/homeassistant/homeassistant/components/sensor/__init__.py line 544 in state
#   /usr/src/homeassistant/homeassistant/components/pi_hole/sensor.py line 111 in native_value

# Minimal repro (conceptual):

def repro():
    # Conditions described in the issue:
    # ### The problem
    # On pi-hole V6, of which release is imminent, the integration no longer works. This is probably because the API has moved
    # See:
    # ![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/abce6b0b-ff19-4ee5-843c-8dfbb5eeed43)
    # ![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/58284482-080d-4d9e-a084-fbfec19145d7)
    raise KeyError('reproduce: see https://github.com/home-assistant/core/issues/130245')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    repro()
expected_fix_hint: Use dict.get() or check membership; handle optional keys.
